# dv.swimmerplot

![](reference/figures/swimmerplot.png)

## Overview

The Swimmer Plot module from DaVinci’s {dv.swimmerplot} package provides
interactive visualization of subject-level treatment and response data
over time. The module is designed to work with DaVinci’s
[{dv.manager}](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/dv.manager/)
package and supports its filtering functionality. The interactive plot
includes tooltips with detailed information for both exposure periods
and response points.

## Installation

You can install the development version of {dv.swimmerplot} from:

``` r

if (!require("remotes")) install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("Boehringer-Ingelheim/dv.swimmerplot")
```

See
[`vignette("dv-swimmerplot")`](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/dv.swimmerplot/articles/dv-swimmerplot.md)
for further information on how to use {dv.swimmerplot} with
[{dv.manager}](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/dv.manager/) to
create interactive swimmer plots with SDTM data from {pharmaversesdtm}.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`mock_swimmerplot()`](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/dv.swimmerplot/reference/mock_swimmerplot.md)
  : Mock app for the swimmerplot module
- [`mock_swimmerplot_mm()`](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/dv.swimmerplot/reference/mock_swimmerplot_mm.md)
  : Run an example swimmer plot module in the module manager
- [`mod_swimmerplot()`](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/dv.swimmerplot/reference/mod_swimmerplot.md)
  : Swimmer Plot Module
- [`swimmerplot_UI()`](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/dv.swimmerplot/reference/swimmerplot_UI.md)
  : Swimmer Plot Module UI
- [`swimmerplot_server()`](https://boehringer-ingelheim.github.io/dv.swimmerplot/reference/swimmerplot_server.md)
  : Swimmer Plot Module server
